allow:
Bash(python -c "
import subprocess, sys
r = subprocess.run\(['cmd','/c','taskkill /PID 11580 /F'], capture_output=True, text=True\)
print\(r.stdout, r.stderr\)
")
Bash(python -c "import shutil; print\(shutil.which\('claude'\) or shutil.which\('claude.cmd'\) or 'NOT FOUND'\)")

Bash(python -c "
import subprocess
r = subprocess.run\(['cmd','/c','taskkill /F /IM python.exe /FI \\"WINDOWTITLE eq mock*\\"'], 
                   capture_output=True, text=True\)
print\(r.stdout or r.stderr\)
" 2>/dev/null; true)
